description_long: This hotel features a symmetrical, modern design with a flat roof punctuated by several large, dome-shaped skylights. The facade is composed of large glass windows framed by reddish-brown structural elements, giving it a contemporary yet inviting appearance. The building is surrounded by lush landscaping, including palm trees and manicured hedges, and features outdoor seating areas with round red tables. Two smaller, dark-roofed structures are positioned at the corners of the property, possibly serving as auxiliary buildings or guest amenities. The main entrance is centrally located and flanked by wide steps, leading up to a spacious terrace. The overall layout suggests a focus on both luxury and relaxation, with ample outdoor space for guests.
description: A modern hotel with dome skylights, large glass windows, and landscaped grounds featuring palm trees and outdoor seating. The design is symmetrical with a central entrance and auxiliary corner structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central steps, dome skylights, and symmetrical landscaping with palm trees and red tables.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dome skylights, glass windows, and one of the auxiliary corner structures with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional dome skylights, and both auxiliary corner buildings with landscaped borders.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the glass windows, dome skylights, and the other auxiliary structure, with visible palm trees and outdoor areas.
